name: HR & Payroll
description: Payroll, PF, ESI, gratuity, performance, recruitment and employee lifecycle compliance.

items.title: Run monthly payroll
items.description: Compute salaries, attendance, leaves, overtime, and release payslips.
items.notes: Cut-off is 25th of the previous month.

items.title: Salary disbursement
items.description: Transfer salaries to employee accounts via bank upload.

items.title: PF deposit (ECR)
items.description: Deposit Provident Fund via EPFO ECR portal.

items.title: TDS on salaries — 24Q filing
items.description: Quarterly TDS return for salary payments.

items.title: Issue Form 16
items.description: Issue Form 16 to employees summarising salary & TDS for the financial year.

items.title: Performance appraisal cycle
items.description: Annual performance review — self-assessment, manager review, compensation revisions.

items.title: Attendance reconciliation
items.description: Reconcile biometric/app attendance with leave register before payroll cut-off.

items.title: HR policy refresh
items.description: Review leave policy, travel policy, POSH and code of conduct annually.

items.title: POSH annual report
items.description: Annual report of Internal Complaints Committee to the District Officer.

items.title: Annual training calendar
items.description: Publish training calendar for the year based on skill matrix and appraisals.
